# "Unshakeable Faith"
## Scripture
"Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for he who has promised is faithful." – Hebrews 10:23
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we face various challenges and uncertainties in life. We may experience trials that shake our faith, but God's promise is unwavering. He is faithful and always keeps His word. Just like a rock-solid foundation, our faith can remain unshakeable if we hold fast to His promise. We must not let the storms of life cause us to doubt or lose our grip on God's faithfulness. Instead, we should draw strength from His promises and stand firm in our convictions. Remember, God's faithfulness is not based on our circumstances but on His character.

## Daily Challenge
"Repeat Hebrews 10:23 to yourself 10 times, then do 20 squats while proclaiming your unshakeable faith in God's promises."
